entries.title: Chart Type Recommendations
entries.description:
# Chart Type Recommendations

## Trend Over Time
- **Best Chart:*\* Line Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Area Chart, Smooth Area
- **Colors:*\* Primary: #0080FF. Multiple series: use distinct colors. Fill: 20% opacity
- **Performance:*\* Excellent (optimized)
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Clear line patterns for colorblind users. Add pattern overlays.
- **Libraries:*\* Chart.js, Recharts, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Zoom

## Compare Categories
- **Best Chart:*\* Bar Chart (Horizontal or Vertical)
- **Secondary:*\* Column Chart, Grouped Bar
- **Colors:*\* Each bar: distinct color. Category: grouped same color. Sorted: descending order
- **Performance:*\* Excellent
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Easy to compare. Add value labels on bars for clarity.
- **Libraries:*\* Chart.js, Recharts, D3.js
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Sort

## Part-to-Whole
- **Best Chart:*\* Pie Chart or Donut
- **Secondary:*\* Stacked Bar, Treemap
- **Colors:*\* Colors: 5-6 max. Contrasting palette. Large slices first. Use labels.
- **Performance:*\* Good (limit 6 slices)
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Hard for accessibility. Better: Stacked bar with legend. Avoid pie if >5 items.
- **Libraries:*\* Chart.js, Recharts, D3.js
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Drill

## Correlation/Distribution
- **Best Chart:*\* Scatter Plot or Bubble Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Heat Map, Matrix
- **Colors:*\* Color axis: gradient (blue-red). Size: relative. Opacity: 0.6-0.8 to show density
- **Performance:*\* Moderate (many points)
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Provide data table alternative. Use pattern + color distinction.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Plotly, Recharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Brush

## Heatmap/Intensity
- **Best Chart:*\* Heat Map or Choropleth
- **Secondary:*\* Grid Heat Map, Bubble Heat
- **Colors:*\* Gradient: Cool (blue) to Hot (red). Scale: clear legend. Divergent for ±data
- **Performance:*\* Excellent (color CSS)
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Colorblind: Use pattern overlay. Provide numerical legend.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Plotly, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Zoom

## Geographic Data
- **Best Chart:*\* Choropleth Map, Bubble Map
- **Secondary:*\* Geographic Heat Map
- **Colors:*\* Regional: single color gradient or categorized colors. Legend: clear scale
- **Performance:*\* Moderate (rendering)
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Include text labels for regions. Provide data table alternative.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Mapbox, Leaflet
- **Interactivity:*\* Pan + Zoom + Drill

## Funnel/Flow
- **Best Chart:*\* Funnel Chart, Sankey
- **Secondary:*\* Waterfall (for flows)
- **Colors:*\* Stages: gradient (starting color → ending color). Show conversion %
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Clear stage labels + percentages. Good for accessibility if labeled.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Recharts, Custom SVG
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Drill

## Performance vs Target
- **Best Chart:*\* Gauge Chart or Bullet Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Dial, Thermometer
- **Colors:*\* Performance: Red→Yellow→Green gradient. Target: marker line. Threshold colors
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Add numerical value + percentage label beside gauge.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, ApexCharts, Custom SVG
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover

## Time-Series Forecast
- **Best Chart:*\* Line with Confidence Band
- **Secondary:*\* Ribbon Chart
- **Colors:*\* Actual: solid line #0080FF. Forecast: dashed #FF9500. Band: light shading
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Clearly distinguish actual vs forecast. Add legend.
- **Libraries:*\* Chart.js, ApexCharts, Plotly
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Toggle

## Anomaly Detection
- **Best Chart:*\* Line Chart with Highlights
- **Secondary:*\* Scatter with Alert
- **Colors:*\* Normal: blue #0080FF. Anomaly: red #FF0000 circle/square marker + alert
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Circle/marker for anomalies. Add text alert annotation.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Plotly, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Alert

## Hierarchical/Nested Data
- **Best Chart:*\* Treemap
- **Secondary:*\* Sunburst, Nested Donut, Icicle
- **Colors:*\* Parent: distinct hues. Children: lighter shades. White borders 2-3px.
- **Performance:*\* Moderate
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Poor - provide table alternative. Label large areas.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Recharts, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Drilldown

## Flow/Process Data
- **Best Chart:*\* Sankey Diagram
- **Secondary:*\* Alluvial, Chord Diagram
- **Colors:*\* Gradient from source to target. Opacity 0.4-0.6 for flows.
- **Performance:*\* Moderate
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Poor - provide flow table alternative.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js (d3-sankey), Plotly
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Drilldown

## Cumulative Changes
- **Best Chart:*\* Waterfall Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Stacked Bar, Cascade
- **Colors:*\* Increases: #4CAF50. Decreases: #F44336. Start: #2196F3. End: #0D47A1.
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Good - clear directional colors with labels.
- **Libraries:*\* ApexCharts, Highcharts, Plotly
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover

## Multi-Variable Comparison
- **Best Chart:*\* Radar/Spider Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Parallel Coordinates, Grouped Bar
- **Colors:*\* Single: #0080FF 20% fill. Multiple: distinct colors per dataset.
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Moderate - limit 5-8 axes. Add data table.
- **Libraries:*\* Chart.js, Recharts, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Toggle

## Stock/Trading OHLC
- **Best Chart:*\* Candlestick Chart
- **Secondary:*\* OHLC Bar, Heikin-Ashi
- **Colors:*\* Bullish: #26A69A. Bearish: #EF5350. Volume: 40% opacity below.
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Moderate - provide OHLC data table.
- **Libraries:*\* Lightweight Charts (TradingView), ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Real-time + Hover + Zoom

## Relationship/Connection Data
- **Best Chart:*\* Network Graph
- **Secondary:*\* Hierarchical Tree, Adjacency Matrix
- **Colors:*\* Node types: categorical colors. Edges: #90A4AE 60% opacity.
- **Performance:** ❌ Poor (500+ nodes struggles)
- **Accessibility:** ❌ Very Poor - provide adjacency list alternative.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js (d3-force), Vis.js, Cytoscape.js
- **Interactivity:*\* Drilldown + Hover + Drag

## Distribution/Statistical
- **Best Chart:*\* Box Plot
- **Secondary:*\* Violin Plot, Beeswarm
- **Colors:*\* Box: #BBDEFB. Border: #1976D2. Median: #D32F2F. Outliers: #F44336.
- **Performance:*\* Excellent
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Good - include stats table (min, Q1, median, Q3, max).
- **Libraries:*\* Plotly, D3.js, Chart.js (plugin)
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover

## Performance vs Target (Compact)
- **Best Chart:*\* Bullet Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Gauge, Progress Bar
- **Colors:*\* Ranges: #FFCDD2, #FFF9C4, #C8E6C9. Performance: #1976D2. Target: black 3px.
- **Performance:*\* Excellent
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Excellent - compact with clear values.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, Plotly, Custom SVG
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover

## Proportional/Percentage
- **Best Chart:*\* Waffle Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Pictogram, Stacked Bar 100%
- **Colors:*\* 10x10 grid. 3-5 categories max. 2-3px spacing between squares.
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ✓ Good - better than pie for accessibility.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js, React-Waffle, Custom CSS Grid
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover

## Hierarchical Proportional
- **Best Chart:*\* Sunburst Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Treemap, Icicle, Circle Packing
- **Colors:*\* Center to outer: darker to lighter. 15-20% lighter per level.
- **Performance:*\* Moderate
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Poor - provide hierarchy table alternative.
- **Libraries:*\* D3.js (d3-hierarchy), Recharts, ApexCharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Drilldown + Hover

## Root Cause Analysis
- **Best Chart:*\* Decomposition Tree
- **Secondary:*\* Decision Tree, Flow Chart
- **Colors:*\* Nodes: #2563EB (Primary) vs #EF4444 (Negative impact). Connectors: Neutral grey.
- **Performance:*\* Moderate (calculation heavy)
- **Accessibility:** ✓ clear hierarchy. Allow keyboard navigation for nodes.
- **Libraries:*\* Power BI (native), React-Flow, Custom D3.js
- **Interactivity:*\* Drill + Expand

## 3D Spatial Data
- **Best Chart:*\* 3D Scatter/Surface Plot
- **Secondary:*\* Volumetric Rendering, Point Cloud
- **Colors:*\* Depth cues: lighting/shading. Z-axis: color gradient (cool to warm).
- **Performance:** ❌ Heavy (WebGL required)
- **Accessibility:** ❌ Poor - requires alternative 2D view or data table.
- **Libraries:*\* Three.js, Deck.gl, Plotly 3D
- **Interactivity:*\* Rotate + Zoom + VR

## Real-Time Streaming
- **Best Chart:*\* Streaming Area Chart
- **Secondary:*\* Ticker Tape, Moving Gauge
- **Colors:*\* Current: Bright Pulse (#00FF00). History: Fading opacity. Grid: Dark.
- **Performance:*\* Optimized (canvas/webgl)
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Flashing elements - provide pause button. High contrast.
- **Libraries:*\* Smoothed D3.js
- **Interactivity:*\* CanvasJS

## Sentiment/Emotion
- **Best Chart:*\* Word Cloud with Sentiment
- **Secondary:*\* Sentiment Arc, Radar Chart
- **Colors:*\* Positive: #22C55E. Negative: #EF4444. Neutral: #94A3B8. Size = Frequency.
- **Performance:*\* Good
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Word clouds poor for screen readers. Use list view.
- **Libraries:*\* D3-cloud, Highcharts, Nivo
- **Interactivity:*\* Hover + Filter

## Process Mining
- **Best Chart:*\* Process Map / Graph
- **Secondary:*\* Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG), Petri Net
- **Colors:*\* Happy path: #10B981 (Thick). Deviations: #F59E0B (Thin). Bottlenecks: #EF4444.
- **Performance:*\* Moderate to Heavy
- **Accessibility:** ⚠ Complex graphs hard to navigate. Provide path summary.
- **Libraries:*\* React-Flow, Cytoscape.js, Recharts
- **Interactivity:*\* Drag + Node-Click

entries.title: Font Pairings Reference (57 combinations)
entries.description:
# Font Pairings Reference

## Classic Elegant
- **Category:*\* Serif + Sans
- **Heading:*\* Playfair Display
- **Body:*\* Inter
- **Mood:*\* elegant, luxury, sophisticated, timeless, premium, editorial
- **Best for:*\* Luxury brands, fashion, spa, beauty, editorial, magazines, high-end e-commerce
- **CSS Import:** `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');`
- **Tailwind:** `fontFamily: { serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'], sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'] }`

## Modern Professional
- **Category:*\* Sans + Sans
- **Heading:*\* Poppins
- **Body:*\* Open Sans
- **Mood:*\* modern, professional, clean, corporate, friendly, approachable
- **Best for:*\* SaaS, corporate sites, business apps, startups, professional services
- **CSS Import:** `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Open+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');`
- **Tailwind:** `fontFamily: { heading: ['Poppins', 'sans-serif'], body: ['Open Sans', 'sans-serif'] }`

## Tech Startup
- **Category:*\* Sans + Sans
- **Heading:*\* Space Grotesk
- **Body:*\* DM Sans
- **Mood:*\* tech, startup, modern, innovative, bold, futuristic

- **CSS Import:** `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');`

## Editorial Classic

## Minimal Swiss

entries.title: Landing Page Patterns
entries.description:
# Landing Page Patterns

## Hero + Features + CTA
- **Keywords:*\* hero, hero-centric, features, feature-rich, cta, call-to-action
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero with headline/image, 2. Value prop, 3. Key features (3-5), 4. CTA section, 5. Footer
- **CTA Placement:*\* Hero (sticky) + Bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Hero: Brand primary or vibrant. Features: Card bg #FAFAFA. CTA: Contrasting accent color
- **Effects:*\* Hero parallax, feature card hover lift, CTA glow on hover
- **Conversion:*\* Deep CTA placement. Use contrasting color (at least 7:1 contrast ratio). Sticky navbar CTA.

## Hero + Testimonials + CTA
- **Keywords:*\* hero, testimonials, social-proof, trust, reviews, cta
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero, 2. Problem statement, 3. Solution overview, 4. Testimonials carousel, 5. CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Hero (sticky) + Post-testimonials
- **Color Strategy:*\* Hero: Brand color. Testimonials: Light bg #F5F5F5. Quotes: Italic, muted color #666. CTA: Vibrant
- **Effects:*\* Testimonial carousel slide animations, quote marks animations, avatar fade-in
- **Conversion:*\* Social proof before CTA. Use 3-5 testimonials. Include photo + name + role. CTA after social proof.

## Product Demo + Features
- **Keywords:*\* demo, product-demo, features, showcase, interactive
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero, 2. Product video/mockup (center), 3. Feature breakdown per section, 4. Comparison (optional), 5. CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Video center + CTA right/bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Video surround: Brand color overlay. Features: Icon color #0080FF. Text: Dark #222
- **Effects:*\* Video play button pulse, feature scroll reveals, demo interaction highlights
- **Conversion:*\* Embedded product demo increases engagement. Use interactive mockup if possible. Auto-play video muted.

## Minimal Single Column
- **Keywords:*\* minimal, simple, direct, single-column, clean
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero headline, 2. Short description, 3. Benefit bullets (3 max), 4. CTA, 5. Footer
- **CTA Placement:*\* Center, large CTA button
- **Color Strategy:*\* Minimalist: Brand + white #FFFFFF + accent. Buttons: High contrast 7:1+. Text: Black/Dark grey
- **Effects:*\* Minimal hover effects. Smooth scroll. CTA scale on hover (subtle)
- **Conversion:*\* Single CTA focus. Large typography. Lots of whitespace. No nav clutter. Mobile-first.

## Funnel (3-Step Conversion)
- **Keywords:*\* funnel, conversion, steps, wizard, onboarding
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero, 2. Step 1 (problem), 3. Step 2 (solution), 4. Step 3 (action), 5. CTA progression
- **CTA Placement:*\* Each step: mini-CTA. Final: main CTA
- **Color Strategy:*\* Step colors: 1 (Red/Problem), 2 (Orange/Process), 3 (Green/Solution). CTA: Brand color
- **Effects:*\* Step number animations, progress bar fill, step transitions smooth scroll
- **Conversion:*\* Progressive disclosure. Show only essential info per step. Use progress indicators. Multiple CTAs.

## Comparison Table + CTA
- **Keywords:*\* comparison, table, compare, versus, cta
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero, 2. Problem intro, 3. Comparison table (product vs competitors), 4. Pricing (optional), 5. CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Table: Right column. CTA: Below table
- **Color Strategy:*\* Table: Alternating rows (white/light grey). Your product: Highlight #FFFACD (light yellow) or green. Text: Dark
- **Effects:*\* Table row hover highlight, price toggle animations, feature checkmark animations
- **Conversion:*\* Use comparison to show unique value. Highlight your product row. Include 'free trial' in pricing row.

## Lead Magnet + Form
- **Keywords:*\* lead, form, signup, capture, email, magnet
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (benefit headline), 2. Lead magnet preview (ebook cover, checklist, etc), 3. Form (minimal fields), 4. CTA submit
- **CTA Placement:*\* Form CTA: Submit button
- **Color Strategy:*\* Lead magnet: Professional design. Form: Clean white bg. Inputs: Light border #CCCCCC. CTA: Brand color
- **Effects:*\* Form focus state animations, input validation animations, success confirmation animation
- **Conversion:*\* Form fields ≤ 3 for best conversion. Offer valuable lead magnet preview. Show form submission progress.

## Pricing Page + CTA
- **Keywords:*\* pricing, plans, tiers, comparison, cta
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (pricing headline), 2. Price comparison cards, 3. Feature comparison table, 4. FAQ section, 5. Final CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Each card: CTA button. Sticky CTA in nav
- **Color Strategy:*\* Free: Grey, Starter: Blue, Pro: Green/Gold, Enterprise: Dark. Cards: 1px border, shadow
- **Effects:*\* Price toggle animation (monthly/yearly), card comparison highlight, FAQ accordion open/close
- **Conversion:*\* Recommend starter plan (pre-select/highlight). Show annual discount (20-30%). Use FAQs to address concerns.

## Video-First Hero
- **Keywords:*\* video, hero, media, visual, engaging
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero with video background, 2. Key features overlay, 3. Benefits section, 4. CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Overlay on video (center/bottom) + Bottom section
- **Color Strategy:*\* Dark overlay 60% on video. Brand accent for CTA. White text on dark.
- **Effects:*\* Video autoplay muted, parallax scroll, text fade-in on scroll
- **Conversion:*\* 86% higher engagement with video. Add captions for accessibility. Compress video for performance.

## Scroll-Triggered Storytelling
- **Keywords:*\* storytelling, scroll, narrative, story, immersive
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Intro hook, 2. Chapter 1 (problem), 3. Chapter 2 (journey), 4. Chapter 3 (solution), 5. Climax CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* End of each chapter (mini) + Final climax CTA
- **Color Strategy:*\* Progressive reveal. Each chapter has distinct color. Building intensity.
- **Effects:*\* ScrollTrigger animations, parallax layers, progressive disclosure, chapter transitions
- **Conversion:*\* Narrative increases time-on-page 3x. Use progress indicator. Mobile: simplify animations.

## AI Personalization Landing
- **Keywords:*\* ai, personalization, smart, recommendation, dynamic
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Dynamic hero (personalized), 2. Relevant features, 3. Tailored testimonials, 4. Smart CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Context-aware placement based on user segment
- **Color Strategy:*\* Adaptive based on user data. A/B test color variations per segment.
- **Effects:*\* Dynamic content swap, fade transitions, personalized product recommendations
- **Conversion:*\* 20%+ conversion with personalization. Requires analytics integration. Fallback for new users.

## Waitlist/Coming Soon
- **Keywords:*\* waitlist, coming-soon, launch, early-access, notify
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero with countdown, 2. Product teaser/preview, 3. Email capture form, 4. Social proof (waitlist count)
- **CTA Placement:*\* Email form prominent (above fold) + Sticky form on scroll
- **Color Strategy:*\* Anticipation: Dark + accent highlights. Countdown in brand color. Urgency indicators.
- **Effects:*\* Countdown timer animation, email validation feedback, success confetti, social share buttons
- **Conversion:*\* Scarcity + exclusivity. Show waitlist count. Early access benefits. Referral program.

## Comparison Table Focus
- **Keywords:*\* comparison, table, versus, compare, features
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (problem statement), 2. Comparison matrix (you vs competitors), 3. Feature deep-dive, 4. Winner CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* After comparison table (highlighted row) + Bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Your product column highlighted (accent bg or green). Competitors neutral. Checkmarks green.
- **Effects:*\* Table row hover highlight, feature checkmark animations, sticky comparison header
- **Conversion:*\* Show value vs competitors. 35% higher conversion. Be factual. Include pricing if favorable.

## Pricing-Focused Landing
- **Keywords:*\* pricing, price, cost, plans, subscription
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (value proposition), 2. Pricing cards (3 tiers), 3. Feature comparison, 4. FAQ, 5. Final CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Each pricing card + Sticky CTA in nav + Bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Popular plan highlighted (brand color border/bg). Free: grey. Enterprise: dark/premium.
- **Effects:*\* Price toggle monthly/annual animation, card hover lift, FAQ accordion smooth open
- **Conversion:*\* Annual discount 20-30%. Recommend mid-tier (most popular badge). Address objections in FAQ.

## App Store Style Landing
- **Keywords:*\* app, mobile, download, store, install
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero with device mockup, 2. Screenshots carousel, 3. Features with icons, 4. Reviews/ratings, 5. Download CTAs
- **CTA Placement:*\* Download buttons prominent (App Store + Play Store) throughout
- **Color Strategy:*\* Dark/light matching app store feel. Star ratings in gold. Screenshots with device frames.
- **Effects:*\* Device mockup rotations, screenshot slider, star rating animations, download button pulse
- **Conversion:*\* Show real screenshots. Include ratings (4.5+ stars). QR code for mobile. Platform-specific CTAs.

## FAQ/Documentation Landing
- **Keywords:*\* faq, documentation, help, support, questions
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero with search bar, 2. Popular categories, 3. FAQ accordion, 4. Contact/support CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Search bar prominent + Contact CTA for unresolved questions
- **Color Strategy:*\* Clean, high readability. Minimal color. Category icons in brand color. Success green for resolved.
- **Effects:*\* Search autocomplete, smooth accordion open/close, category hover, helpful feedback buttons
- **Conversion:*\* Reduce support tickets. Track search analytics. Show related articles. Contact escalation path.

## Immersive/Interactive Experience
- **Keywords:*\* immersive, interactive, experience, 3d, animation
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Full-screen interactive element, 2. Guided product tour, 3. Key benefits revealed, 4. CTA after completion
- **CTA Placement:*\* After interaction complete + Skip option for impatient users
- **Color Strategy:*\* Immersive experience colors. Dark background for focus. Highlight interactive elements.
- **Effects:*\* WebGL, 3D interactions, gamification elements, progress indicators, reward animations
- **Conversion:*\* 40% higher engagement. Performance trade-off. Provide skip option. Mobile fallback essential.

## Event/Conference Landing
- **Keywords:*\* event, conference, meetup, registration, schedule
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (date/location/countdown), 2. Speakers grid, 3. Agenda/schedule, 4. Sponsors, 5. Register CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Register CTA sticky + After speakers + Bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Urgency colors (countdown). Event branding. Speaker cards professional. Sponsor logos neutral.
- **Effects:*\* Countdown timer, speaker hover cards with bio, agenda tabs, early bird countdown
- **Conversion:*\* Early bird pricing with deadline. Social proof (past attendees). Speaker credibility. Multi-ticket discounts.

## Product Review/Ratings Focused
- **Keywords:*\* reviews, ratings, testimonials, social-proof, stars
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (product + aggregate rating), 2. Rating breakdown, 3. Individual reviews, 4. Buy/CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* After reviews summary + Buy button alongside reviews
- **Color Strategy:*\* Trust colors. Star ratings gold. Verified badge green. Review sentiment colors.
- **Effects:*\* Star fill animations, review filtering, helpful vote interactions, photo lightbox
- **Conversion:*\* User-generated content builds trust. Show verified purchases. Filter by rating. Respond to negative reviews.

## Community/Forum Landing
- **Keywords:*\* community, forum, social, members, discussion
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (community value prop), 2. Popular topics/categories, 3. Active members showcase, 4. Join CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* Join button prominent + After member showcase
- **Color Strategy:*\* Warm, welcoming. Member photos add humanity. Topic badges in brand colors. Activity indicators green.
- **Effects:*\* Member avatars animation, activity feed live updates, topic hover previews, join success celebration
- **Conversion:*\* Show active community (member count, posts today). Highlight benefits. Preview content. Easy onboarding.

## Before-After Transformation
- **Keywords:*\* before-after, transformation, results, comparison
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (problem state), 2. Transformation slider/comparison, 3. How it works, 4. Results CTA
- **CTA Placement:*\* After transformation reveal + Bottom
- **Color Strategy:*\* Contrast: muted/grey (before) vs vibrant/colorful (after). Success green for results.
- **Effects:*\* Slider comparison interaction, before/after reveal animations, result counters, testimonial videos
- **Conversion:*\* Visual proof of value. 45% higher conversion. Real results. Specific metrics. Guarantee offer.

## Marketplace / Directory
- **Keywords:*\* marketplace, directory, search, listing
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (Search focused), 2. Categories, 3. Featured Listings, 4. Trust/Safety, 5. CTA (Become a host/seller)
- **CTA Placement:*\* Hero Search Bar + Navbar 'List your item'
- **Color Strategy:*\* Search: High contrast. Categories: Visual icons. Trust: Blue/Green.
- **Effects:*\* Search autocomplete animation
- **Conversion:*\* map hover pins,  card carousel, Search bar is the CTA. Reduce friction to search. Popular searches suggestions.

## Newsletter / Content First
- **Keywords:*\* newsletter, content, writer, blog, subscribe
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (Value Prop + Form), 2. Recent Issues/Archives, 3. Social Proof (Subscriber count), 4. About Author
- **CTA Placement:*\* Hero inline form + Sticky header form
- **Color Strategy:*\* Minimalist. Paper-like background. Text focus. Accent color for Subscribe.
- **Effects:*\* Text highlight animations
- **Conversion:*\* typewriter effect,  subtle fade-in, Single field form (Email only). Show 'Join X, 000 readers'. Read sample link.

## Webinar Registration
- **Keywords:*\* webinar, registration, event, training, live
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (Topic + Timer + Form), 2. What you'll learn, 3. Speaker Bio, 4. Urgency/Bonuses, 5. Form (again)
- **CTA Placement:*\* Hero (Right side form) + Bottom anchor
- **Color Strategy:*\* Urgency: Red/Orange. Professional: Blue/Navy. Form: High contrast white.
- **Effects:*\* Countdown timer
- **Conversion:*\* speaker avatar float,  urgent ticker, Limited seats logic. 'Live' indicator. Auto-fill timezone.

## Enterprise Gateway
- **Keywords:*\* enterprise, corporate, gateway, solutions, portal
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (Video/Mission), 2. Solutions by Industry, 3. Solutions by Role, 4. Client Logos, 5. Contact Sales
- **CTA Placement:*\* Contact Sales (Primary) + Login (Secondary)
- **Color Strategy:*\* Corporate: Navy/Grey. High integrity. Conservative accents.
- **Effects:*\* Slow video background
- **Conversion:*\* logo carousel,  tab switching for industries, Path selection (I am a...). Mega menu navigation. Trust signals prominent.

## Portfolio Grid
- **Keywords:*\* portfolio, grid, showcase, gallery, masonry
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Hero (Name/Role), 2. Project Grid (Masonry), 3. About/Philosophy, 4. Contact
- **CTA Placement:*\* Project Card Hover + Footer Contact
- **Color Strategy:*\* Neutral background (let work shine). Text: Black/White. Accent: Minimal.
- **Effects:*\* Image lazy load reveal
- **Conversion:*\* hover overlay info,  lightbox view, Visuals first. Filter by category. Fast loading essential.

## Horizontal Scroll Journey
- **Keywords:*\* horizontal, scroll, journey, gallery, storytelling, panoramic
- **Section Order:*\* 1. Intro (Vertical), 2. The Journey (Horizontal Track), 3. Detail Reveal, 4. Vertical Footer
- **CTA Placement:*\* Floating Sticky CTA or End of Horizontal Track
- **Color Strategy:*\* Continuous palette transition. Chapter colors. Progress bar #000000.
- **Effects:*\* Scroll-jacking (careful), parallax layers, horizontal slide, progress indicator
- **Conversion:*\* Immersive product discovery. High engagement. Keep navigation visible.

## Bento Grid Showcase
- **Keywords:*\* bento
- **Section Order:*\* grid
- **CTA Placement:*\* features
- **Color Strategy:*\* modular
- **Effects:*\* apple-style
- **Conversion:*\* showcase

## Interactive 3D Configurator
- **Keywords:*\* 3d
- **Section Order:*\* configurator
- **CTA Placement:*\* customizer
- **Color Strategy:*\* interactive
- **Effects:*\* product
- **Conversion:*\* 1. Hero (Configurator)

## AI-Driven Dynamic Landing
- **Keywords:*\* ai
- **Section Order:*\* dynamic
- **CTA Placement:*\* personalized
- **Color Strategy:*\* adaptive
- **Effects:*\* generative
- **Conversion:*\* 1. Prompt/Input Hero

entries.title: Product Type Design Recommendations
entries.description:
# Product Type Design Recommendations

## SaaS (General)
- **Keywords:*\* app, b2b, cloud, general, saas, software, subscription
- **Primary Style:*\* Glassmorphism + Flat Design
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Soft UI Evolution, Minimalism
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Hero + Features + CTA
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Data-Dense + Real-Time Monitoring
- **Color Focus:*\* Trust blue + accent contrast
- **Key Considerations:*\* Balance modern feel with clarity. Focus on CTAs.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Excessive animation + Dark mode by default

## Micro SaaS
- **Keywords:*\* app, b2b, cloud, indie, micro, micro-saas, niche, saas, small, software, solo, subscription
- **Primary Style:*\* Flat Design + Vibrant & Block
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Motion-Driven, Micro-interactions
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Minimal & Direct + Demo
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Executive Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Vibrant primary + white space
- **Key Considerations:*\* Keep simple, show product quickly. Speed is key.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Complex onboarding flow + Cluttered layout

## E-commerce
- **Keywords:*\* buy, commerce, e, ecommerce, products, retail, sell, shop, store
- **Primary Style:*\* Vibrant & Block-based
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Aurora UI, Motion-Driven
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Feature-Rich Showcase
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Sales Intelligence Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Brand primary + success green
- **Key Considerations:*\* Engagement & conversions. High visual hierarchy.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Flat design without depth + Text-heavy pages

## E-commerce Luxury
- **Keywords:*\* buy, commerce, e, ecommerce, elegant, exclusive, high-end, luxury, premium, products, retail, sell, shop, store
- **Primary Style:*\* Liquid Glass + Glassmorphism
- **Secondary Styles:*\* 3D & Hyperrealism, Aurora UI
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Feature-Rich Showcase
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Sales Intelligence Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Premium colors + minimal accent
- **Key Considerations:*\* Elegance & sophistication. Premium materials.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Vibrant & Block-based + Playful colors

## Service Landing Page
- **Keywords:*\* appointment, booking, consultation, conversion, landing, marketing, page, service
- **Primary Style:*\* Hero-Centric + Trust & Authority
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Social Proof-Focused, Storytelling
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Hero-Centric Design
- **Dashboard Style:*\* N/A - Analytics for conversions
- **Color Focus:*\* Brand primary + trust colors
- **Key Considerations:*\* Social proof essential. Show expertise.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Complex navigation + Hidden contact info

## B2B Service
- **Keywords:*\* appointment, b, b2b, booking, business, consultation, corporate, enterprise, service
- **Primary Style:*\* Trust & Authority + Minimal
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Feature-Rich, Conversion-Optimized
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Feature-Rich Showcase
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Sales Intelligence Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Professional blue + neutral grey
- **Key Considerations:*\* Credibility essential. Clear ROI messaging.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Playful design + Hidden credentials + AI purple/pink gradients

## Financial Dashboard
- **Keywords:*\* admin, analytics, dashboard, data, financial, panel
- **Primary Style:*\* Dark Mode (OLED) + Data-Dense
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Minimalism, Accessible & Ethical
- **Landing Pattern:*\* N/A - Dashboard focused
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Financial Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Dark bg + red/green alerts + trust blue
- **Key Considerations:*\* High contrast, real-time updates, accuracy paramount.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Light mode default + Slow rendering

## Analytics Dashboard
- **Keywords:*\* admin, analytics, dashboard, data, panel
- **Primary Style:*\* Data-Dense + Heat Map & Heatmap
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Minimalism, Dark Mode (OLED)
- **Landing Pattern:*\* N/A - Analytics focused
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Drill-Down Analytics + Comparative
- **Color Focus:*\* Cool→Hot gradients + neutral grey
- **Key Considerations:*\* Clarity > aesthetics. Color-coded data priority.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Ornate design + No filtering

## Healthcare App
- **Keywords:*\* app, clinic, health, healthcare, medical, patient
- **Primary Style:*\* Neumorphism + Accessible & Ethical
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Soft UI Evolution, Claymorphism (for patients)
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Social Proof-Focused
- **Dashboard Style:*\* User Behavior Analytics
- **Color Focus:*\* Calm blue + health green + trust
- **Key Considerations:*\* Accessibility mandatory. Calming aesthetic.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Bright neon colors + Motion-heavy animations + AI purple/pink gradients

## Educational App
- **Keywords:*\* app, course, education, educational, learning, school, training
- **Primary Style:*\* Claymorphism + Micro-interactions
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Vibrant & Block-based, Flat Design
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Storytelling-Driven
- **Dashboard Style:*\* User Behavior Analytics
- **Color Focus:*\* Playful colors + clear hierarchy
- **Key Considerations:*\* Engagement & ease of use. Age-appropriate design.


## Creative Agency
- **Keywords:*\* agency, creative, design, marketing, studio
- **Primary Style:*\* Brutalism + Motion-Driven
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Retro-Futurism, Storytelling-Driven
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Storytelling-Driven
- **Dashboard Style:*\* N/A - Portfolio focused
- **Color Focus:*\* Bold primaries + artistic freedom
- **Key Considerations:*\* Differentiation key. Wow-factor necessary.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Corporate minimalism + Hidden portfolio

## Portfolio/Personal
- **Keywords:*\* creative, personal, portfolio, projects, showcase, work
- **Primary Style:*\* Motion-Driven + Minimalism
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Brutalism, Aurora UI
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Storytelling-Driven
- **Dashboard Style:*\* N/A - Personal branding
- **Color Focus:*\* Brand primary + artistic interpretation
- **Key Considerations:*\* Showcase work. Personality shine through.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Corporate templates + Generic layouts

## Gaming
- **Keywords:*\* entertainment, esports, game, gaming, play
- **Primary Style:*\* 3D & Hyperrealism + Retro-Futurism
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Motion-Driven, Vibrant & Block
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Feature-Rich Showcase
- **Dashboard Style:*\* N/A - Game focused
- **Color Focus:*\* Vibrant + neon + immersive colors
- **Key Considerations:*\* Immersion priority. Performance critical.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Minimalist design + Static assets

## Government/Public Service
- **Keywords:*\* appointment, booking, consultation, government, public, service
- **Primary Style:*\* Accessible & Ethical + Minimalism
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Flat Design, Inclusive Design
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Minimal & Direct
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Executive Dashboard
- **Color Focus:*\* Professional blue + high contrast
- **Key Considerations:*\* WCAG AAA mandatory. Trust paramount.


## Fintech/Crypto
- **Keywords:*\* banking, blockchain, crypto, defi, finance, fintech, money, nft, payment, web3
- **Primary Style:*\* Glassmorphism + Dark Mode (OLED)
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Retro-Futurism, Motion-Driven
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Conversion-Optimized
- **Dashboard Style:*\* Real-Time Monitoring + Predictive
- **Color Focus:*\* Dark tech colors + trust + vibrant accents
- **Key Considerations:*\* Security perception. Real-time data critical.
- **Anti-Patterns:*\* Light backgrounds + No security indicators

## Social Media App
- **Keywords:*\* app, community, content, entertainment, media, network, sharing, social, streaming, users, video
- **Primary Style:*\* Vibrant & Block-based + Motion-Driven
- **Secondary Styles:*\* Aurora UI, Micro-interactions
- **Landing Pattern:*\* Feature-Rich Showcase
- **Dashboard Style:*\* User Behavior Analytics

entries.title: astro Implementation Guidelines
entries.description:
# astro Implementation Guidelines ## Architecture: Use Islands Architecture Astro's partial hydration only loads JS for interactive components **Do:*\* Interactive components with client directives **Don't:*\* Hydrate entire page like traditional SPA ``` ``` ## Architecture: Default to zero JS Astro ships zero JS by default - add only when needed **Do:*\* Static components without client directive **Don't:*\* Add client:load to everything ```
(static) ``` ## Architecture: Choose right client directive Different directives for different hydration timing **Do:*\* client:visible for below-fold client:idle for non-critical **Don't:*\* client:load for everything ``` ``` ## Architecture: Use content collections Type-safe content management for blogs docs **Do:*\* Content collections for structured content **Don't:*\* Loose markdown files without schema ``` const posts = await getCollection('blog') ``` ## Architecture: Define collection schemas Zod schemas for content validation **Do:*\* Schema with required fields and types **Don't:*\* No schema validation ``` defineCollection({ schema: z.object({...}) }) ``` ## Routing: Use file-based routing Create routes by adding .astro files in pages/ **Do:*\* pages/ directory for routes **Don't:*\* Manual route configuration ``` src/pages/about.astro ``` ## Routing: Dynamic routes with brackets Use [param] for dynamic routes **Do:*\* Bracket notation for params **Don't:*\* Query strings for dynamic content ``` pages/blog/[slug].astro ``` ## Routing: Use getStaticPaths for SSG Generate static pages at build time **Do:*\* getStaticPaths for known dynamic routes **Don't:*\* Fetch at runtime for static content ``` export async function getStaticPaths() { return [...] } ``` ## Routing: Enable SSR when needed Server-side rendering for dynamic content **Do:*\* output: 'server' or 'hybrid' for dynamic **Don't:*\* SSR for purely static sites ``` export const prerender = false; ``` ## Components: Keep .astro for static Use .astro components for static content **Do:*\* Astro components for layout structure **Don't:*\* React/Vue for static markup ``` ``` ## Components: Use framework components for interactivity React Vue Svelte for complex interactivity **Do:*\* Framework component with client directive **Don't:*\* Astro component with inline scripts ``` ``` ## Components: Pass data via props Astro components receive props in frontmatter **Do:*\* Astro.props for component data **Don't:*\* Global state for simple data ``` const { title } = Astro.props; ``` ## Components: Use slots for composition Named and default slots for flexible layouts **Do:** ` for child content` **Don't:*\* Props for HTML content ``` ``` ## Components: Colocate component styles Scoped styles in component file **Do:** ` ``` ## Styling: Use scoped styles by default Astro scopes styles to component automatically **Do:** ` (scoped) ``` ## Styling: Use is:global sparingly Global styles only when truly needed **Do:*\* is:global for base styles or overrides **Don't:*\* is:global for component styles ``` ``` ## Styling: Integrate Tailwind properly Use @astrojs/tailwind integration **Do:*\* Official Tailwind integration **Don't:*\* Manual Tailwind setup ``` npx astro add tailwind ``` ## Styling: Use CSS variables for theming Define tokens in :root **Do:*\* CSS custom properties for themes **Don't:*\* Hardcoded colors everywhere ``` :root { --primary: #3b82f6; } ``` ## Data: Fetch in frontmatter Data fetching in component frontmatter **Do:*\* Top-level await in frontmatter **Don't:*\* useEffect for initial data ``` const data = await fetch(url) ``` ## Data: Use Astro.glob for local files Import multiple local files **Do:*\* Astro.glob for markdown/data files **Don't:*\* Manual imports for each file ``` const posts = await Astro.glob('./posts/*.md') ``` ## Data: Prefer content collections over glob Type-safe collections for structured content **Do:*\* getCollection() for blog/docs **Don't:*\* Astro.glob for structured content ``` await getCollection('blog') ``` ## Data: Use environment variables correctly Import.meta.env for env vars **Do:*\* PUBLIC_ prefix for client vars **Don't:*\* Expose secrets to client ``` import.meta.env.PUBLIC_API_URL ``` ## Performance: Preload critical assets Use link preload for important resources **Do:*\* Preload fonts above-fold images **Don't:*\* No preload hints ``` ``` ## Performance: Optimize images with astro:assets Built-in image optimization **Do:** ` component for optimization` **Don't:** ` for local images` ``` import { Image } from 'astro:assets'; ``` ## Performance: Use picture for responsive images Multiple formats and sizes **Do:** ` for art direction` **Don't:*\* Single image size for all screens ``` with multiple sources ``` ## Performance: Lazy load below-fold content Defer loading non-critical content **Do:*\* loading=lazy for images client:visible for components **Don't:*\* Load everything immediately ``` ``` ## Performance: Minimize client directives Each directive adds JS bundle **Do:*\* Audit client: usage regularly **Don't:*\* Sprinkle client:load everywhere ``` Only interactive components hydrated ``` ## ViewTransitions: Enable View Transitions Smooth page transitions **Do:** ` in head` **Don't:*\* Full page reloads ``` import { ViewTransitions } from 'astro:transitions'; ``` ## ViewTransitions: Use transition:name Named elements for morphing **Do:*\* transition:name for persistent elements **Don't:*\* Unnamed transitions ```
``` ## ViewTransitions: Handle transition:persist Keep state across navigations **Do:*\* transition:persist for media players **Don't:*\* Re-initialize on every navigation ```

entries.title: flutter Implementation Guidelines
entries.description:
# flutter Implementation Guidelines

## Widgets: Use StatelessWidget when possible

Immutable widgets are simpler

**Do:*\* StatelessWidget for static UI
**Don't:*\* StatefulWidget for everything

```
class MyWidget extends StatelessWidget
```

## Widgets: Keep widgets small

Single responsibility principle

**Do:*\* Extract widgets into smaller pieces
**Don't:*\* Large build methods

```
Column(children: [Header() Content()])
```

## Widgets: Use const constructors

Compile-time constants for performance

**Do:*\* const MyWidget() when possible
**Don't:*\* Non-const for static widgets

```
const Text('Hello')
```

## Widgets: Prefer composition over inheritance

Combine widgets using children

**Do:*\* Compose widgets
**Don't:*\* Extend widget classes

```
Container(child: MyContent())
```

## State: Use setState correctly

Minimal state in StatefulWidget

**Do:*\* setState for UI state changes
**Don't:*\* setState for business logic

```
setState(() { _counter++; })
```

## State: Avoid setState in build

Never call setState during build

**Do:*\* setState in callbacks only
**Don't:*\* setState in build method

```
onPressed: () => setState(() {})
```

## State: Use state management for complex apps

Provider Riverpod BLoC

**Do:*\* State management for shared state
**Don't:*\* setState for global state

```
Provider.of<MyState>(context)
```

## State: Prefer Riverpod or Provider

Recommended state solutions

**Do:*\* Riverpod for new projects
**Don't:*\* InheritedWidget manually

```
ref.watch(myProvider)
```

## State: Dispose resources

Clean up controllers and subscriptions

**Do:*\* dispose() for cleanup
**Don't:*\* Memory leaks from subscriptions

```
@override void dispose() { controller.dispose(); }
```

## Layout: Use Column and Row

Basic layout widgets

**Do:*\* Column Row for linear layouts
**Don't:*\* Stack for simple layouts

```
Column(children: [Text(), Button()])
```

## Layout: Use Expanded and Flexible

Control flex behavior

**Do:*\* Expanded to fill space
**Don't:*\* Fixed sizes in flex containers

```
Expanded(child: Container())
```

## Layout: Use SizedBox for spacing

Consistent spacing

**Do:*\* SizedBox for gaps
**Don't:*\* Container for spacing only

```
SizedBox(height: 16)
```

## Layout: Use LayoutBuilder for responsive

Respond to constraints

**Do:*\* LayoutBuilder for adaptive layouts
**Don't:*\* Fixed sizes for responsive

```
LayoutBuilder(builder: (context constraints) {})
```

## Layout: Avoid deep nesting

Keep widget tree shallow

**Do:*\* Extract deeply nested widgets
**Don't:*\* 10+ levels of nesting

```
Extract widget to method or class
```

## Lists: Use ListView.builder

Lazy list building

**Do:*\* ListView.builder for long lists
**Don't:*\* ListView with children for large lists

```
ListView.builder(itemCount: 100, itemBuilder: ...)
```

## Lists: Provide itemExtent when known

Skip measurement

**Do:*\* itemExtent for fixed height items
**Don't:*\* No itemExtent for uniform lists

```
ListView.builder(itemExtent: 50)
```

## Lists: Use keys for stateful items

Preserve widget state

**Do:*\* Key for stateful list items
**Don't:*\* No key for dynamic lists

```
ListTile(key: ValueKey(item.id))
```

## Lists: Use SliverList for custom scroll

Custom scroll effects

**Do:*\* CustomScrollView with Slivers
**Don't:*\* Nested ListViews

```
CustomScrollView(slivers: [SliverList()])
```

## Navigation: Use Navigator 2.0 or GoRouter

Declarative routing

**Do:*\* go_router for navigation
**Don't:*\* Navigator.push for complex apps

```
GoRouter(routes: [...])
```

## Navigation: Use named routes

Organized navigation

**Do:*\* Named routes for clarity
**Don't:*\* Anonymous routes

```
Navigator.pushNamed(context '/home')
```

## Navigation: Handle back button (PopScope)

Android back behavior and predictive back (Android 14+)

**Do:*\* Use PopScope widget (WillPopScope is deprecated)
**Don't:*\* Use WillPopScope

```
PopScope(canPop: false, onPopInvoked: (didPop) => ...)
```

## Navigation: Pass typed arguments

Type-safe route arguments

**Do:*\* Typed route arguments
**Don't:*\* Dynamic arguments

```
MyRoute(id: '123')
```

## Async: Use FutureBuilder

Async UI building

**Do:*\* FutureBuilder for async data
**Don't:*\* setState for async

```
FutureBuilder(future: fetchData())
```

## Async: Use StreamBuilder

Stream UI building

**Do:*\* StreamBuilder for streams
**Don't:*\* Manual stream subscription

```
StreamBuilder(stream: myStream)
```

## Async: Handle loading and error states

Complete async UI states

**Do:*\* ConnectionState checks
**Don't:*\* Only success state

```
if (snapshot.connectionState == ConnectionState.waiting)
```

## Async: Cancel subscriptions

Clean up stream subscriptions

**Do:*\* Cancel in dispose
**Don't:*\* Memory leaks

```
subscription.cancel() in dispose
```

## Theming: Use ThemeData

Consistent theming

**Do:*\* ThemeData for app theme
**Don't:*\* Hardcoded colors

```
Theme.of(context).primaryColor
```

## Theming: Use ColorScheme

Material 3 color system

**Do:*\* ColorScheme for colors
**Don't:*\* Individual color properties

```
colorScheme: ColorScheme.fromSeed()
```

## Theming: Access theme via context

Dynamic theme access

**Do:*\* Theme.of(context)
**Don't:*\* Static theme reference

```
Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyLarge
```

## Theming: Support dark mode

Respect system theme

**Do:*\* darkTheme in MaterialApp
**Don't:*\* Light theme only

```
MaterialApp(theme: light, darkTheme: dark)
```

## Animation: Use implicit animations

Simple animations

**Do:*\* AnimatedContainer AnimatedOpacity
**Don't:*\* Explicit for simple transitions

```
AnimatedContainer(duration: Duration())
```

## Animation: Use AnimationController for complex

Fine-grained control

**Do:*\* AnimationController with Ticker
**Don't:*\* Implicit for complex sequences

```
AnimationController(vsync: this)
```

## Animation: Dispose AnimationControllers

Clean up animation resources

**Do:*\* dispose() for controllers
**Don't:*\* Memory leaks

```
controller.dispose() in dispose
```

## Animation: Use Hero for transitions

Shared element transitions

**Do:*\* Hero for navigation animations
**Don't:*\* Manual shared element

```
Hero(tag: 'image' child: Image())
```

## Forms: Use Form widget

Form validation

**Do:*\* Form with GlobalKey
**Don't:*\* Individual validation

```
Form(key: _formKey child: ...)
```

## Forms: Use TextEditingController

Control text input

**Do:*\* Controller for text fields
**Don't:*\* onChanged for all text

```
final controller = TextEditingController()
```

## Forms: Validate on submit

Form validation flow

**Do:*\* _formKey.currentState!.validate()
**Don't:*\* Skip validation

```
if (_formKey.currentState!.validate())
```

## Forms: Dispose controllers

Clean up text controllers

**Do:*\* dispose() for controllers
**Don't:*\* Memory leaks

```
controller.dispose() in dispose
```

## Performance: Use const widgets

Reduce rebuilds

**Do:*\* const for static widgets
**Don't:*\* No const for literals

```
const Icon(Icons.add)
```

## Performance: Avoid rebuilding entire tree

Minimal rebuild scope

**Do:*\* Isolate changing widgets
**Don't:*\* setState on parent

```
Consumer only around changing widget
```

## Performance: Use RepaintBoundary

Isolate repaints

**Do:*\* RepaintBoundary for animations
**Don't:*\* Full screen repaints

```
RepaintBoundary(child: AnimatedWidget())
```

## Performance: Profile with DevTools

Measure before optimizing

**Do:*\* Flutter DevTools profiling
**Don't:*\* Guess at performance

```
DevTools performance tab
```

## Accessibility: Use Semantics widget

Screen reader support

**Do:*\* Semantics for accessibility
**Don't:*\* Missing accessibility info

```
Semantics(label: 'Submit button')
```

## Accessibility: Support large fonts

MediaQuery text scaling

**Do:*\* MediaQuery.textScaleFactor
**Don't:*\* Fixed font sizes

```
style: Theme.of(context).textTheme
```

## Accessibility: Test with screen readers

TalkBack and VoiceOver

**Do:*\* Test accessibility regularly
**Don't:*\* Skip accessibility testing

```
Regular TalkBack testing
```

## Testing: Use widget tests

Test widget behavior

**Do:*\* WidgetTester for UI tests
**Don't:*\* Unit tests only

```
testWidgets('...' (tester) async {})
```

## Testing: Use integration tests

Full app testing

**Do:*\* integration_test package
**Don't:*\* Manual testing only

```
IntegrationTestWidgetsFlutterBinding
```

## Testing: Mock dependencies

Isolate tests

**Do:*\* Mockito or mocktail
**Don't:*\* Real dependencies in tests

```
when(mock.method()).thenReturn()
```

## Platform: Use Platform checks

Platform-specific code

**Do:*\* Platform.isIOS Platform.isAndroid
**Don't:*\* Same code for all platforms

```
if (Platform.isIOS) {}
```

## Platform: Use kIsWeb for web

Web platform detection

**Do:*\* kIsWeb for web checks
**Don't:*\* Platform for web

```
if (kIsWeb) {}
```

## Packages: Use pub.dev packages

Community packages

**Do:*\* Popular maintained packages
**Don't:*\* Custom implementations

```
cached_network_image
```

## Packages: Check package quality

Quality before adding

**Do:*\* Pub points and popularity
**Don't:*\* Any package without review

```
100+ pub points
```

entries.title: html-tailwind Implementation Guidelines
entries.description: # html-tailwind Implementation Guidelines ## Animation: Use Tailwind animate utilities Built-in animations are optimized and respect reduced-motion **Do:*\* Use animate-pulse animate-spin animate-ping **Don't:*\* Custom @keyframes for simple effects ``` animate-pulse ``` ## Animation: Limit bounce animations Continuous bounce is distracting and causes motion sickness **Do:*\* Use animate-bounce sparingly on CTAs only **Don't:*\* Multiple bounce animations on page ``` Single CTA with animate-bounce ``` ## Animation: Transition duration Use appropriate transition speeds for UI feedback **Do:*\* duration-150 to duration-300 for UI **Don't:*\* duration-1000 or longer for UI elements ``` transition-all duration-200 ``` ## Animation: Hover transitions Add smooth transitions on hover state changes **Do:*\* Add transition class with hover states **Don't:*\* Instant hover changes without transition ``` hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors ``` ## Z-Index: Use Tailwind z-\* scale Consistent stacking context with predefined scale **Do:*\* z-0 z-10 z-20 z-30 z-40 z-50 **Don't:*\* Arbitrary z-index values ``` z-50 for modals ``` ## Z-Index: Fixed elements z-index Fixed navigation and modals need explicit z-index **Do:*\* z-50 for nav z-40 for dropdowns **Don't:*\* Relying on DOM order for stacking ``` fixed top-0 z-50 ``` ## Z-Index: Negative z-index for backgrounds Use negative z-index for decorative backgrounds **Do:*\* z-[-1] for background elements **Don't:*\* Positive z-index for backgrounds ``` -z-10 for decorative ``` ## Layout: Container max-width Limit content width for readability **Do:*\* max-w-7xl mx-auto for main content **Don't:*\* Full-width content on large screens ``` max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 ``` ## Layout: Responsive padding Adjust padding for different screen sizes **Do:*\* px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 **Don't:*\* Same padding all sizes ``` px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 ``` ## Layout: Grid gaps Use consistent gap utilities for spacing **Do:*\* gap-4 gap-6 gap-8 **Don't:*\* Margins on individual items ``` grid gap-6 ``` ## Layout: Flexbox alignment Use flex utilities for alignment **Do:*\* items-center justify-between **Don't:*\* Multiple nested wrappers ``` flex items-center justify-between ``` ## Images: Aspect ratio Maintain consistent image aspect ratios **Do:*\* aspect-video aspect-square **Don't:*\* No aspect ratio on containers ``` aspect-video rounded-lg ``` ## Images: Object fit Control image scaling within containers **Do:*\* object-cover object-contain **Don't:*\* Stretched distorted images ``` object-cover w-full h-full ``` ## Images: Lazy loading Defer loading of off-screen images **Do:*\* loading='lazy' on images **Don't:*\* All images eager load ``` ``` ## Images: Responsive images Serve appropriate image sizes **Do:*\* srcset and sizes attributes **Don't:*\* Same large image all devices ``` srcset with multiple sizes ``` ## Typography: Prose plugin Use @tailwindcss/typography for rich text **Do:*\* prose prose-lg for article content **Don't:*\* Custom styles for markdown ``` prose prose-lg max-w-none ``` ## Typography: Line height Use appropriate line height for readability **Do:*\* leading-relaxed for body text **Don't:*\* Default tight line height ``` leading-relaxed (1.625) ``` ## Typography: Font size scale Use consistent text size scale **Do:*\* text-sm text-base text-lg text-xl **Don't:*\* Arbitrary font sizes ``` text-lg ``` ## Typography: Text truncation Handle long text gracefully **Do:*\* truncate or line-clamp-* **Don't:*\* Overflow breaking layout ``` line-clamp-2 ``` ## Colors: Opacity utilities Use color opacity utilities **Do:*\* bg-black/50 text-white/80 **Don't:*\* Separate opacity class ``` bg-black/50 ``` ## Colors: Dark mode Support dark mode with dark: prefix **Do:*\* dark:bg-gray-900 dark:text-white **Don't:*\* No dark mode support ``` dark:bg-gray-900 ``` ## Colors: Semantic colors Use semantic color naming in config **Do:*\* primary secondary danger success **Don't:*\* Generic color names in components ``` bg-primary ``` ## Spacing: Consistent spacing scale Use Tailwind spacing scale consistently **Do:*\* p-4 m-6 gap-8 **Don't:*\* Arbitrary pixel values ``` p-4 (1rem) ``` ## Spacing: Negative margins Use sparingly for overlapping effects **Do:** -mt-4 for overlapping elements **Don't:*\* Negative margins for layout fixing ``` -mt-8 for card overlap ``` ## Spacing: Space between Use space-y-\* for vertical lists **Do:*\* space-y-4 on flex/grid column **Don't:*\* Margin on each child ``` space-y-4 ``` ## Forms: Focus states Always show focus indicators **Do:*\* focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 **Don't:*\* Remove focus outline ``` focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 ``` ## Forms: Input sizing Consistent input dimensions **Do:*\* h-10 px-3 for inputs **Don't:*\* Inconsistent input heights ``` h-10 w-full px-3 ``` ## Forms: Disabled states Clear disabled styling **Do:*\* disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed **Don't:*\* No disabled indication ``` disabled:opacity-50 ``` ## Forms: Placeholder styling Style placeholder text appropriately **Do:*\* placeholder:text-gray-400 **Don't:*\* Dark placeholder text ``` placeholder:text-gray-400 ``` ## Responsive: Mobile-first approach Start with mobile styles and add breakpoints **Do:*\* Default mobile + md: lg: xl: **Don't:*\* Desktop-first approach ``` text-sm md:text-base ``` ## Responsive: Breakpoint testing Test at standard breakpoints **Do:*\* 320 375 768 1024 1280 1536 **Don't:*\* Only test on development device ``` Test all breakpoints ``` ## Responsive: Hidden/shown utilities Control visibility per breakpoint **Do:*\* hidden md:block **Don't:*\* Different content per breakpoint ``` hidden md:flex ``` ## Buttons: Button sizing Consistent button dimensions **Do:*\* px-4 py-2 or px-6 py-3 **Don't:*\* Inconsistent button sizes ``` px-4 py-2 text-sm ``` ## Buttons: Touch targets Minimum 44px touch target on mobile **Do:*\* min-h-[44px] on mobile **Don't:*\* Small buttons on mobile ``` min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] ``` ## Buttons: Loading states Show loading feedback **Do:*\* disabled + spinner icon **Don't:*\* Clickable during loading ``` ``` ## Buttons: Icon buttons Accessible icon-only buttons **Do:*\* aria-label on icon buttons **Don't:*\* Icon button without label ``` ``` ## Cards: Card structure Consistent card styling **Do:*\* rounded-lg shadow-md p-6 **Don't:*\* Inconsistent card styles ``` rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-6 ``` ## Cards: Card hover states Interactive cards should have hover feedback **Do:*\* hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow **Don't:*\* No hover on clickable cards ``` hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow ``` ## Cards: Card spacing Consistent internal card spacing **Do:*\* space-y-4 for card content **Don't:*\* Inconsistent internal spacing ``` space-y-4 or p-6 ``` ## Accessibility: Screen reader text Provide context for screen readers **Do:*\* sr-only for hidden labels **Don't:*\* Missing context for icons ``` Close menu ``` ## Accessibility: Focus visible Show focus only for keyboard users **Do:*\* focus-visible:ring-2 **Don't:*\* Focus on all interactions ``` focus-visible:ring-2 ``` ## Accessibility: Reduced motion Respect user motion preferences **Do:*\* motion-reduce:animate-none **Don't:*\* Ignore motion preferences ``` motion-reduce:transition-none ``` ## Performance: Configure content paths Tailwind needs to know where classes are used **Do:*\* Use 'content' array in config **Don't:*\* Use deprecated 'purge' option (v2) ``` content: ['./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}'] ``` ## Performance: JIT mode Use JIT for faster builds and smaller bundles **Do:*\* JIT enabled (default in v3) **Don't:*\* Full CSS in development ``` Tailwind v3 defaults ``` ## Performance: Avoid @apply bloat Use @apply sparingly **Do:*\* Direct utilities in HTML **Don't:*\* Heavy @apply usage ``` class='px-4 py-2 rounded' ``` ## Plugins: Official plugins Use official Tailwind plugins **Do:** @tailwindcss/forms typography aspect-ratio **Don't:*\* Custom implementations ``` @tailwindcss/forms ``` ## Plugins: Custom utilities Create utilities for repeated patterns **Do:*\* Custom utility in config **Don't:*\* Repeated arbitrary values ``` Custom shadow utility ``` ## Layout: Container Queries Use @container for component-based responsiveness **Do:*\* Use @container and @lg: etc. **Don't:*\* Media queries for component internals ``` @container @lg:grid-cols-2 ``` ## Interactivity: Group and Peer Style based on parent/sibling state **Do:*\* group-hover peer-checked **Don't:*\* JS for simple state interactions ``` group-hover:text-blue-500 ``` ## Customization: Arbitrary Values Use [] for one-off values **Do:*\* w-[350px] for specific needs **Don't:*\* Creating config for single use ``` top-[117px] (if strictly needed) ``` ## Colors: Theme color variables Define colors in Tailwind theme and use directly **Do:*\* bg-primary text-success border-cta **Don't:*\* bg-[var(--color-primary)] text-[var(--color-success)] ``` bg-primary ``` ## Colors: Use bg-linear-to-\* for gradients Tailwind v4 uses bg-linear-to-\* syntax for gradients **Do:*\* bg-linear-to-r bg-linear-to-b **Don't:*\* bg-gradient-to-* (deprecated in v4) ``` bg-linear-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500 ``` ## Layout: Use shrink-0 shorthand Shorter class name for flex-shrink-0 **Do:*\* shrink-0 shrink **Don't:*\* flex-shrink-0 flex-shrink ``` shrink-0 ``` ## Layout: Use size-\* for square dimensions Single utility for equal width and height **Do:*\* size-4 size-8 size-12 **Don't:*\* Separate h-\* w-\* for squares ``` size-6 ``` ## Images: SVG explicit dimensions Add width/height attributes to SVGs to prevent layout shift before CSS loads **Do:** `

entries.title: jetpack-compose Implementation Guidelines
entries.description:
# jetpack-compose Implementation Guidelines

## Composable: Pure UI composables

Composable functions should only render UI

**Do:*\* Accept state and callbacks
**Don't:*\* Calling usecase/repo

```
Pure UI composable
```

## Composable: Small composables

Each composable has single responsibility

**Do:*\* Split into components
**Don't:*\* Huge composable

```
Reusable UI
```

## Composable: Stateless by default

Prefer stateless composables

**Do:*\* Hoist state
**Don't:*\* Local mutable state

```
Stateless UI
```

## State: Single source of truth

UI state comes from one source

**Do:*\* StateFlow from VM
**Don't:*\* Multiple states

```
Unified UiState
```

## State: Model UI State

Use sealed interface/data class

**Do:*\* UiState.Loading
**Don't:*\* Boolean flags

```
Explicit state
```

## State: remember only UI state

remember for UI-only state

**Do:*\* Scroll, animation
**Don't:*\* Business state

```
Correct remember
```

## State: rememberSaveable

Persist state across config

**Do:*\* rememberSaveable
**Don't:*\* remember

```
State survives
```

## State: derivedStateOf

Optimize recomposition

**Do:*\* derivedStateOf
**Don't:*\* Recompute always

```
Optimized
```

## SideEffect: LaunchedEffect keys

Use correct keys

**Do:*\* LaunchedEffect(id)
**Don't:*\* LaunchedEffect(Unit)

```
Scoped effect
```

## SideEffect: rememberUpdatedState

Avoid stale lambdas

**Do:*\* rememberUpdatedState
**Don't:*\* Capture directly

```
Safe callback
```

## SideEffect: DisposableEffect

Clean up resources

**Do:*\* onDispose
**Don't:*\* No cleanup

```
No leak
```

## Architecture: Unidirectional data flow

UI → VM → State

**Do:*\* onEvent
**Don't:*\* Two-way binding

```
Predictable flow
```

## Architecture: No business logic in UI

Logic belongs to VM

**Do:*\* Collect state
**Don't:*\* Call repo

```
Clean UI
```

## Architecture: Expose immutable state

Expose StateFlow

**Do:*\* asStateFlow
**Don't:*\* Mutable exposed

```
Safe API
```

## Lifecycle: Lifecycle-aware collect

Use collectAsStateWithLifecycle

**Do:*\* Lifecycle aware
**Don't:*\* collectAsState

```
No leak
```

## Navigation: Event-based navigation

VM emits navigation event

**Do:*\* VM: Channel + receiveAsFlow(), V: Collect with Dispatchers.Main.immediate
**Don't:*\* Nav in UI

```
Decoupled nav
```

## Navigation: Typed routes

Use sealed routes

**Do:*\* sealed class Route
**Don't:*\* String routes

```
Type-safe
```

## Performance: Stable parameters

Prefer immutable/stable params

**Do:** @Immutable
**Don't:*\* Mutable params

```
Stable recomposition
```

## Performance: Use key in Lazy

Provide stable keys

**Do:*\* key=id
**Don't:*\* No key

```
Stable list
```

## Performance: Avoid heavy work

No heavy computation in UI

**Do:*\* Precompute in VM
**Don't:*\* Compute in UI

```
Smooth UI
```

## Performance: Remember expensive objects

remember heavy objects

**Do:*\* remember
**Don't:*\* Recreate each recomposition

```
Efficient
```

## Theming: Design system

Centralized theme

**Do:*\* Material3 tokens
**Don't:*\* Hardcoded values

```
Consistent UI
```

## Theming: Dark mode support

Theme-based colors

**Do:*\* colorScheme
**Don't:*\* Fixed color

```
Adaptive UI
```

## Layout: Prefer Modifier over extra layouts

Use Modifier to adjust layout instead of adding wrapper composables

**Do:*\* Use Modifier.padding()
**Don't:*\* Wrap content with extra Box

```
Padding via modifier
```

## Layout: Avoid deep layout nesting

Deep layout trees increase measure & layout cost

**Do:*\* Keep layout flat
**Don't:*\* Box ? Column ? Box ? Row

```
Flat hierarchy
```

## Layout: Use Row/Column for linear layout

Linear layouts are simpler and more performant

**Do:*\* Use Row / Column
**Don't:*\* Custom layout for simple cases

```
Row/Column usage
```

## Layout: Use Box only for overlapping content

Box should be used only when children overlap

**Do:*\* Stack elements
**Don't:*\* Use Box as Column

```
Proper overlay
```

## Layout: Prefer LazyColumn over Column scroll

Lazy layouts are virtualized and efficient

**Do:*\* LazyColumn
**Don't:*\* Column.verticalScroll()

```
Lazy list
```

## Layout: Avoid nested scroll containers

Nested scrolling causes UX & performance issues

**Do:*\* Single scroll container
**Don't:*\* Scroll inside scroll

```
One scroll per screen
```

## Layout: Avoid fillMaxSize by default

fillMaxSize may break parent constraints

**Do:*\* Use exact size
**Don't:*\* Fill max everywhere

```
Constraint-aware size
```

## Layout: Avoid intrinsic size unless necessary

Intrinsic measurement is expensive

**Do:*\* Explicit sizing
**Don't:*\* IntrinsicSize.Min

```
Predictable layout
```

## Layout: Use Arrangement and Alignment APIs

Declare layout intent explicitly

**Do:*\* Use Arrangement / Alignment
**Don't:*\* Manual spacing hacks

```
Declarative spacing
```

## Layout: Extract reusable layout patterns

Repeated layouts should be shared

**Do:*\* Create layout composable
**Don't:*\* Copy-paste layouts

```
Reusable scaffold
```

## Theming: No hardcoded text style

Use typography

**Do:*\* MaterialTheme.typography
**Don't:*\* Hardcode sp

```
Scalable
```

## Testing: Stateless UI testing

Composable easy to test

**Do:*\* Pass state
**Don't:*\* Hidden state

```
Testable
```

## Testing: Use testTag

Stable UI selectors

**Do:*\* Modifier.testTag
**Don't:*\* Find by text

```
Stable tests
```

## Preview: Multiple previews

Preview multiple states

**Do:** @Preview
**Don't:*\* Single preview

```
Better dev UX
```

## DI: Inject VM via Hilt

Use hiltViewModel

**Do:** @HiltViewModel
**Don't:*\* Manual VM

```
Clean DI
```

## DI: No DI in UI

Inject in VM

**Do:*\* Constructor inject
**Don't:*\* Inject composable

```
Proper scope
```

## Accessibility: Content description

Accessible UI

**Do:*\* contentDescription
**Don't:*\* Ignore a11y

```
Inclusive
```

## Accessibility: Semantics

Use semantics API

**Do:*\* Modifier.semantics
**Don't:*\* None

```
Testable a11y
```

## Animation: Compose animation APIs

Use animate*AsState

**Do:*\* AnimatedVisibility
**Don't:*\* Manual anim

```
Smooth
```

## Animation: Avoid animation logic in VM

Animation is UI concern

**Do:*\* Animate in UI
**Don't:*\* Animate in VM

```
Correct layering
```

## Modularization: Feature-based UI modules

UI per feature

**Do:** :feature:ui
**Don't:*\* God module

```
Scalable
```

## Modularization: Public UI contracts

Expose minimal UI API

**Do:*\* Interface/Route
**Don't:*\* Expose impl

```
Encapsulated
```

## State: Snapshot state only

Use Compose state

**Do:*\* mutableStateOf
**Don't:*\* Custom observable

```
Compose aware
```

## State: Avoid mutable collections

Immutable list/map

**Do:*\* PersistentList
**Don't:*\* MutableList

```
Stable UI
```

## Lifecycle: RememberCoroutineScope usage

Only for UI jobs

**Do:*\* UI coroutine
**Don't:*\* Long jobs

```
Scoped job
```

## Interop: Interop View carefully

Use AndroidView

**Do:*\* Isolated usage
**Don't:*\* Mix everywhere

```
Safe interop
```

## Interop: Avoid legacy patterns

No LiveData in UI

**Do:*\* StateFlow
**Don't:*\* LiveData

```
Modern stack
```

## Debug: Use layout inspector

Inspect recomposition

**Do:*\* Tools
**Don't:*\* Blind debug

```
Fast debug
```

## Debug: Enable recomposition counts

Track recomposition

**Do:*\* Debug flags
**Don't:*\* Ignore

```
Performance aware
```

entries.title: nextjs Implementation Guidelines
entries.description:
# nextjs Implementation Guidelines ## Routing: Use App Router for new projects App Router is the recommended approach in Next.js 14+ **Do:*\* app/ directory with page.tsx **Don't:*\* pages/ for new projects ``` app/dashboard/page.tsx ``` ## Routing: Use file-based routing Create routes by adding files in app directory **Do:*\* page.tsx for routes layout.tsx for layouts **Don't:*\* Manual route configuration ``` app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx ``` ## Routing: Colocate related files Keep components styles tests with their routes **Do:*\* Component files alongside page.tsx **Don't:*\* Separate components folder ``` app/dashboard/_components/ ``` ## Routing: Use route groups for organization Group routes without affecting URL **Do:*\* Parentheses for route groups **Don't:*\* Nested folders affecting URL ``` (marketing)/about/page.tsx ``` ## Routing: Handle loading states Use loading.tsx for route loading UI **Do:*\* loading.tsx alongside page.tsx **Don't:*\* Manual loading state management ``` app/dashboard/loading.tsx ``` ## Routing: Handle errors with error.tsx Catch errors at route level **Do:*\* error.tsx with reset function **Don't:*\* try/catch in every component ``` app/dashboard/error.tsx ``` ## Rendering: Use Server Components by default Server Components reduce client JS bundle **Do:*\* Keep components server by default **Don't:*\* Add 'use client' unnecessarily ``` export default function Page() ``` ## Rendering: Mark Client Components explicitly 'use client' for interactive components **Do:*\* Add 'use client' only when needed **Don't:*\* Server Component with hooks/events ``` ('use client') for onClick useState ``` ## Rendering: Push Client Components down Keep Client Components as leaf nodes **Do:*\* Client wrapper for interactive parts only **Don't:*\* Mark page as Client Component ``` in Server Page ``` ## Rendering: Use streaming for better UX Stream content with Suspense boundaries **Do:*\* Suspense for slow data fetches **Don't:*\* Wait for all data before render ``` ``` ## Rendering: Choose correct rendering strategy SSG for static SSR for dynamic ISR for semi-static **Do:*\* generateStaticParams for known paths **Don't:*\* SSR for static content ``` export const revalidate = 3600 ``` ## DataFetching: Fetch data in Server Components Fetch directly in async Server Components **Do:*\* async function Page() { const data = await fetch() } **Don't:*\* useEffect for initial data ``` const data = await fetch(url) ``` ## DataFetching: Configure caching explicitly (Next.js 15+) Next.js 15 changed defaults to uncached for fetch **Do:*\* Explicitly set cache: 'force-cache' for static data **Don't:*\* Assume default is cached (it's not in Next.js 15) ``` fetch(url { cache: 'force-cache' }) ``` ## DataFetching: Deduplicate fetch requests React and Next.js dedupe same requests **Do:*\* Same fetch call in multiple components **Don't:*\* Manual request deduplication ``` Multiple components fetch same URL ``` ## DataFetching: Use Server Actions for mutations Server Actions for form submissions **Do:*\* action={serverAction} in forms **Don't:*\* API route for every mutation ```
``` ## DataFetching: Revalidate data appropriately Use revalidatePath/revalidateTag after mutations **Do:*\* Revalidate after Server Action **Don't:** 'use client' with manual refetch ``` revalidatePath('/posts') ``` ## Images: Use next/image for optimization Automatic image optimization and lazy loading **Do:** ` component for all images` **Don't:** ` tags directly` ``` ``` ## Images: Provide width and height Prevent layout shift with dimensions **Do:*\* width and height props or fill **Don't:*\* Missing dimensions ``` ``` ## Images: Use fill for responsive images Fill container with object-fit **Do:*\* fill prop with relative parent **Don't:*\* Fixed dimensions for responsive ``` ``` ## Images: Configure remote image domains Whitelist external image sources **Do:*\* remotePatterns in next.config.js **Don't:*\* Allow all domains ``` remotePatterns: [{ hostname: 'cdn.example.com' }] ``` ## Images: Use priority for LCP images Mark above-fold images as priority **Do:*\* priority prop on hero images **Don't:*\* All images with priority ``` ``` ## Fonts: Use next/font for fonts Self-hosted fonts with zero layout shift **Do:*\* next/font/google or next/font/local **Don't:*\* External font links ``` import { Inter } from 'next/font/google' ``` ## Fonts: Apply font to layout Set font in root layout for consistency **Do:*\* className on body in layout.tsx **Don't:*\* Font in individual pages ``` ``` ## Fonts: Use variable fonts Variable fonts reduce bundle size **Do:*\* Single variable font file **Don't:*\* Multiple font weights as files ``` Inter({ subsets: ['latin'] }) ``` ## Metadata: Use generateMetadata for dynamic Generate metadata based on params **Do:*\* export async function generateMetadata() **Don't:*\* Hardcoded metadata everywhere ``` generateMetadata({ params }) ``` ## Metadata: Include OpenGraph images Add OG images for social sharing **Do:*\* opengraph-image.tsx or og property **Don't:*\* Missing social preview images ``` opengraph: { images: ['/og.png'] } ``` ## Metadata: Use metadata API Export metadata object for static metadata **Do:*\* export const metadata = {} **Don't:*\* Manual head tags ``` export const metadata = { title: 'Page' } ``` ## API: Use Route Handlers for APIs app/api routes for API endpoints **Do:*\* app/api/users/route.ts **Don't:*\* pages/api for new projects ``` export async function GET(request) ``` ## API: Return proper Response objects Use NextResponse for API responses **Do:*\* NextResponse.json() for JSON **Don't:*\* Plain objects or res.json() ``` return NextResponse.json({ data }) ``` ## API: Handle HTTP methods explicitly Export named functions for methods **Do:*\* Export GET POST PUT DELETE **Don't:*\* Single handler for all methods ``` export async function POST() ``` ## API: Validate request body Validate input before processing **Do:*\* Zod or similar for validation **Don't:*\* Trust client input ``` const body = schema.parse(await req.json()) ``` ## Middleware: Use middleware for auth Protect routes with middleware.ts **Do:*\* middleware.ts at root **Don't:*\* Auth check in every page ``` export function middleware(request) ``` ## Middleware: Match specific paths Configure middleware matcher **Do:*\* config.matcher for specific routes **Don't:*\* Run middleware on all routes ``` matcher: ['/dashboard/:path*'] ``` ## Middleware: Keep middleware edge-compatible Middleware runs on Edge runtime **Do:*\* Edge-compatible code only **Don't:*\* Node.js APIs in middleware ``` Edge-compatible auth check ``` ## Environment: Use NEXT_PUBLIC prefix Client-accessible env vars need prefix **Do:*\* NEXT_PUBLIC_ for client vars **Don't:*\* Server vars exposed to client ``` NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ``` ## Environment: Validate env vars Check required env vars exist **Do:*\* Validate on startup **Don't:*\* Undefined env at runtime ``` if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) throw ``` ## Environment: Use .env.local for secrets Local env file for development secrets **Do:** .env.local gitignored **Don't:*\* Secrets in .env committed ``` .env.local with secrets ``` ## Performance: Analyze bundle size Use @next/bundle-analyzer **Do:*\* Bundle analyzer in dev **Don't:*\* Ship large bundles blindly ``` ANALYZE=true npm run build ``` ## Performance: Use dynamic imports Code split with next/dynamic **Do:*\* dynamic() for heavy components **Don't:*\* Import everything statically ``` const Chart = dynamic(() => import('./Chart')) ``` ## Performance: Avoid layout shifts Reserve space for dynamic content **Do:*\* Skeleton loaders aspect ratios **Don't:*\* Content popping in ``` ``` ## Performance: Use Partial Prerendering Combine static and dynamic in one route **Do:*\* Static shell with Suspense holes **Don't:*\* Full dynamic or static pages ``` Static header + dynamic content ``` ## Link: Use next/link for navigation Client-side navigation with prefetching **Do:** ` for internal links` **Don't:** ` for internal navigation` ``` About ``` ## Link: Prefetch strategically Control prefetching behavior **Do:*\* prefetch={false} for low-priority **Don't:*\* Prefetch all links ``` ``` ## Link: Use scroll option appropriately Control scroll behavior on navigation **Do:*\* scroll={false} for tabs pagination **Don't:*\* Always scroll to top ``` ``` ## Config: Use next.config.js correctly Configure Next.js behavior **Do:*\* Proper config options **Don't:*\* Deprecated or wrong options ``` images: { remotePatterns: [] } ``` ## Config: Enable strict mode Catch potential issues early **Do:*\* reactStrictMode: true **Don't:*\* Strict mode disabled ``` reactStrictMode: true ``` ## Config: Configure redirects and rewrites Use config for URL management **Do:*\* redirects() rewrites() in config **Don't:*\* Manual redirect handling ``` redirects: async () => [...] ``` ## Deployment: Use Vercel for easiest deploy Vercel optimized for Next.js **Do:*\* Deploy to Vercel **Don't:*\* Self-host without knowledge ``` vercel deploy ``` ## Deployment: Configure output for self-hosting Set output option for deployment target **Do:*\* output: 'standalone' for Docker **Don't:*\* Default output for containers ``` output: 'standalone' ``` ## Security: Sanitize user input Never trust user input **Do:*\* Escape sanitize validate all input **Don't:*\* Direct interpolation of user data ``` DOMPurify.sanitize(userInput) ``` ## Security: Use CSP headers Content Security Policy for XSS protection **Do:*\* Configure CSP in next.config.js **Don't:*\* No security headers ``` headers() with CSP ``` ## Security: Validate Server Action input Server Actions are public endpoints **Do:*\* Validate and authorize in Server Action **Don't:*\* Trust Server Action input ``` Auth check + validation in action ```

entries.title: nuxt-ui Implementation Guidelines
entries.description:
# nuxt-ui Implementation Guidelines

## Installation: Add Nuxt UI module

Install and configure Nuxt UI in your Nuxt project

**Do:*\* pnpm add @nuxt/ui and add to modules
**Don't:*\* Manual component imports

```
modules: ['@nuxt/ui']
```

## Installation: Import Tailwind and Nuxt UI CSS

Required CSS imports in main.css file

**Do:** @import tailwindcss and @import @nuxt/ui
**Don't:*\* Skip CSS imports

```
@import "tailwindcss"; @import "@nuxt/ui";
```

## Installation: Wrap app with UApp component

UApp provides global configs for Toast Tooltip and overlays

**Do:** `<UApp> wrapper in app.vue`
**Don't:*\* Skip UApp wrapper

```
<UApp><NuxtPage/></UApp>
```

## Components: Use U prefix for components

All Nuxt UI components use U prefix by default

**Do:*\* UButton UInput UModal
**Don't:*\* Button Input Modal

```
<UButton>Click</UButton>
```

## Components: Use semantic color props

Use semantic colors like primary secondary error

**Do:*\* color=primary color=error
**Don't:*\* Hardcoded colors

```
<UButton color="primary">
```

## Components: Use variant prop for styling

Nuxt UI provides solid outline soft subtle ghost link variants

**Do:*\* variant=soft variant=outline
**Don't:*\* Custom button classes

```
<UButton variant="soft">
```

## Components: Use size prop consistently

Components support xs sm md lg xl sizes

**Do:*\* size=sm size=lg
**Don't:*\* Arbitrary sizing classes

```
<UButton size="lg">
```

## Icons: Use icon prop with Iconify format

Nuxt UI supports Iconify icons via icon prop

**Do:*\* icon=lucide:home icon=heroicons:user
**Don't:*\* i-lucide-home format

```
<UButton icon="lucide:home">
```

## Icons: Use leadingIcon and trailingIcon

Position icons with dedicated props for clarity

**Do:*\* leadingIcon=lucide:plus trailingIcon=lucide:arrow-right
**Don't:*\* Manual icon positioning

```
<UButton leadingIcon="lucide:plus">
```

## Theming: Configure colors in app.config.ts

Runtime color configuration without restart
